items.title: Ola Electric doubles QoQ growth in Q1 FY27; registers 16,144 vehicles in June
items.summary: Ola Electric registered 16,144 vehicles in June, its highest monthly registration figure in recent quarters.

items.title: Why is crucial tech vulnerable to the heat?
items.summary: Energy grids and train services are among the vital services that are vulnerable to very hot weather.
